_meta.purpose: Six-layer vault isolation declaration (design §7, D1). Layers 1-3 generate worker settings (harness.vault.isolation_settings); layers 4-6 are structural commitments the operator/loop must keep true. validate_isolation() refuses a vault whose declaration is incomplete. The canary read-attempt in the gate self-tests is the proof; this file is only the claim.
_meta.vault_path_note: vault_path is deployment config; the default below is for this repo's own build loop.

structural_layers.config_out_of_scope: worker settings + deny rules live outside every worker-writable scope; the machinery-paths gate (C2) and ratified-branch config rule enforce it
structural_layers.egress_control: no SSH-agent forwarding into workers; vault host unreachable with worker credentials; proxy allowlist on unattended firings
structural_layers.role_processes: implementers and validators run as separate headless one-shot processes; subagents inherit the parent sandbox, so divergent policies require separate processes
